Off Calendar May-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Sarah Tesconi, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Heller Manus Architects
Jeffery D. Trowbridge, Esq., appeared for defendant and opposing party: 524 Howard, LLC

RULING:
HEARING HELD: Plaintiff Heller Manus Architects's Application For Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED in the amount of $122,947.93. Tha undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Plaintiff's objection Numbers 1,2, 5-12 overruled; objections Numbers 3 & 4 are sustained. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
